subject: iPhone battery draining rapidly after update
description: Battery drops from 100 % to under 50 % within a few hours of normal use; started right after the latest iOS update.

ts_steps.title: Background Activity
ts_steps.action: Tap app rows — note high background.

ts_steps.title: Background App Refresh
ts_steps.action: Off for heavy offenders; or global test off.

ts_steps.title: Location Services
ts_steps.action: Settings → Privacy → Location — set apps to While Using unless needed Always.

ts_steps.title: Display
ts_steps.action: Lower brightness; Auto-Brightness on; shorter Auto-Lock.

ts_steps.title: Wait indexing window
ts_steps.action: 24–48h on charger Wi-Fi after major upgrade.

ts_steps.title: Battery Health
ts_steps.action: Settings → Battery → Battery Health — capacity and Peak Performance.

ts_steps.title: Patch iOS
ts_steps.action: Dot release if known drain bug.

ts_steps.title: Erase setup as new
ts_steps.action: Last resort compare bare OS — backup first.

internal_information: Indexing, background GPS, bad app, failing battery hardware, iOS bug.
